status_legend.outranked_within_group: qualified, but group already has max_tickers_per_group better scores
status_legend.group_outranked: qualified, but group ranked below top_n
status_legend.group_below_min_candidates: qualified, but group has fewer than min_candidates tickers
status_legend.failed_history_gate: less than min_history_days of price history
status_legend.failed_mcap_gate: market cap below min_market_cap USD (or unavailable)
status_legend.no_valid_data: no usable price data (needs >=63 trading days incl. current year)
